messages.content:
我们进一步比较了VideoChat-A2 与其他模型的average frame number and average inference time，以展现our method 在推理效率上的优势。As shown in Table 2，VideoChat-A2 在测试中，仅仅需要平均76.4帧和27.5s。与闭源模型Gemini-1.5-pro 相比，our method 的frame usage 和 inference time 都减少了超过85%。在计算高效的同时，our method 在性能上也很有竞争力。与large-sized MLLM，i.e. GPT-4o和qwen2-vl-72b，相比，VideoChat-A2在VideoMME和 VSI-Bench上都取得了不错的性能提升。
  
帮我翻译为英文
  
可以仿照这个内容格式
  
Table 2 presents a comparison of the average frame number and average inference time across various models. Compared to both closed-source models and large open source models, VideoChat-A1 achieves substantial gains in efficiency. For instance, VideoChat-A1 (InternVL2.5-8B) processes only 35.9 frames and completes inference in 14.7 seconds on average, reducing frame usage by over 90% and inference time by more than 85% compared to GPT-4o, Gemini 1.5 Pro, and Qwen2.5-VL-72B. Despite these significant savings, our method maintains competitive performance across benchmarks. In contrast to small open-source models such as Qwen2.5-VL-7B, VideoChat-A1 not only delivers significantly better performance but also requires fewer video frames and achieves faster or comparable inference.
  
  
翻译要严谨学术

We further compare VideoChat-A2 with other models in terms of average frame number and average inference time to demonstrate the superiority of our method in inference efficiency. As shown in Table 2, VideoChat-A2 requires only an average of 76.4 frames and 27.5 seconds during testing. Compared to the closed-source model Gemini-1.5-Pro, our method reduces both frame usage and inference time by over 85%. While achieving high computational efficiency, our method also delivers competitive performance. Compared to large-sized MLLMs, i.e., GPT-4o and Qwen2-VL-72B, VideoChat-A2 achieves notable performance improvements on both VideoMME and VSI-Bench.

% As shown in Figure 5，随着max round 的增加，我们在Video-MME,VideoMMMU，LongVideoBench等多个Benchmark上面都观察到了our method 性能的稳步提升，展现了VideoChat-A2在推理阶段具有良好的test-time scaling 特性。随着number of max round from 2 to 5，our method 在5个benchmark上面平均提高了9.1%的准确率.
  
翻译为英文

As shown in Figure 5, with the increase of max rounds, we observe steady performance improvements of our method across multiple benchmarks including Video-MME, VideoMMMU, and LongVideoBench, demonstrating that VideoChat-A2 exhibits favorable test-time scaling properties during inference. As the number of max rounds increases from 2 to 5, our method achieves an average accuracy improvement of 9.1% across the five benchmarks.
想表达的意思大概是，随着max round 的增加，性能逐步提升，但是从4到5提升非常优先，从计算效率方面考虑，最终选择4作为max round 限制

As shown in Figure 5, with the increase of max rounds, we observe steady performance improvements of our method across multiple benchmarks including VideoMME, VideoMMMU, LongVideoBench, and VSI-Bench, demonstrating that VideoChat-A2 exhibits favorable test-time scaling properties during inference. However, the performance gain from 4 to 5 rounds is marginal. Considering computational efficiency, we ultimately select 4 as the max round limit.
